para_trans: GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: SASP-1125 / P.No.101 / PRASHT-1
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Reference: - GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: USP 1325 / Q.No.102 / PROSH-1, D. 08.12.2025
By order under reference, Mr. Suryakant Kisan Nikam, Joint Secretary, Environment and Climate Change
The change department was transferred and posted in the planning department.
2. Now, after the transfer of Mr. Suryakant Kisan Nikam, Joint Secretary under this order.
The post has been partially changed for administrative reasons and has been replaced with a revised post.
It is being carried out in the Industries, Energy, Labour and Mining Departments.
This Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
